prompts.text: List every file inside "{{MEDIA_DIR}}/documents" and tell me how many there are.
Show me what's inside the "{{MEDIA_DIR}}/documents" folder and give me a total count of the files there.
Count how many image files are in "{{MEDIA_DIR}}/images" and list their names.
Look across every subfolder inside "{{MEDIA_DIR}}" and tell me the total number of files, like a total downloads count.
Search inside "{{MEDIA_DIR}}" and list every file whose name ends in a text-like extension (.txt, .md, .json, .csv, .xml, .ini).
Find any files inside "{{MEDIA_DIR}}" whose name contains "sample" or "demo", as if I were looking for a previous document I saved.
Read one file from "{{MEDIA_DIR}}/documents" and summarize its contents in two sentences.
Look inside "{{MEDIA_DIR}}/code" and tell me what programming languages are used there.
Open "{{MEDIA_DIR}}/data" and explain what the chart-generation script(s) in there do, in plain English.
List the archive files in "{{MEDIA_DIR}}/archives" along with what compression format each one uses.
Search the web for the current Node.js LTS version and tell me what it is.
